task_completion.description: The agent processes the raw video to remove overscan borders, deinterlace, and encode to MP4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing an ffmpeg command with a crop filter (e.g., crop=688:448:16:16), a deinterlace filter (e.g., yadif), and outputting to clean_run.mp4, or a GUI video editor with equivalent settings applied.

task_completion.description: The agent extracts the audio track from the raw video into a standalone MP3 file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing an ffmpeg command extracting audio to run_audio.mp3, or an audio/video GUI tool exporting the audio track as MP3.

task_completion.description: The agent captures a still frame from the processed video at the 0:25 mark.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing an ffmpeg command with a time seek flag (e.g., -ss 00:00:25 or -ss 25) outputting to victory_thumbnail.png, or a video player paused at 0:25 with a snapshot being taken.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a manifest.json file containing the required metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or terminal echo/cat command showing a JSON structure with keys 'runner' ('ga_agent'), 'original_resolution' ('720x480'), 'cropped_resolution' ('688x448'), and 'deinterlaced' (true).

task_completion.description: All required files are successfully saved in the leaderboard_submission directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal 'ls' command or file manager window showing clean_run.mp4, run_audio.mp3, victory_thumbnail.png, and manifest.json inside /home/ga/Videos/leaderboard_submission/.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely processed the media files rather than creating empty mock files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show actual processing logs (e.g., ffmpeg progress output showing frames, fps, and bitrate) or a real media application processing the files, not just 'touch' commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the specified raw capture file as the input.
integrity.visual_evidence: Commands or GUI inputs explicitly reference /home/ga/Videos/raw_capture/speedrun_raw.mpg as the input file.

integrity.description: The agent manually or programmatically constructed the JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing, echoing, or using a script to generate the JSON content, rather than copying a pre-existing solution file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output files: /home/ga/Videos/leaderboard_submission/clean_run.mp4, /home/ga/Videos/leaderboard_submission/run_audio.mp3, /home/ga/Videos/leaderboard_submission/victory_thumbnail.png, /home/ga/Videos/leaderboard_submission/manifest.json. Expected cropped dimensions: 688x448.
